title: Dawn Sturgess Inquiry report
body: "In 2021, the government established an independent inquiry to investigate the circumstances of Dawn Sturgess’s death in Salisbury on 8 July 2018.  The Rt Hon Lord Hughes of Ombersley was appointed chair and the inquiry was formally established in March 2022.  Its terms of reference are available on The Dawn Sturgess Inquiry website.   For accessibility information, read the Dawn Sturgess Inquiry accessibility statement.  "
